title: Carry out wool pressing
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out wool pressing demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for wool pressing

pcs.text: Communicate with wool harvesting team members to identify WHS hazards and report to the supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with wool harvesting team members to identify WHS hazards and report to the supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with wool harvesting team members to identify WHS hazards and report to the supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, use and fit suitable personal protective equipment (PPE) correctly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, use and fit suitable personal protective equipment (PPE) correctly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, use and fit suitable personal protective equipment (PPE) correctly.

pcs.text: Check the wool press for safe operation and report any issues to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check the wool press for safe operation and report any issues to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the wool press for safe operation and report any issues to supervisor.

pcs.text: Carry out any required lubrication and maintenance as directed by supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out any required lubrication and maintenance as directed by supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out any required lubrication and maintenance as directed by supervisor.

pcs.text: Prepare the work area in readiness for pressing as instructed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare the work area in readiness for pressing as instructed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare the work area in readiness for pressing as instructed.

pcs.text: Check the scales to be used for accuracy and calibrate, if necessary, as instructed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check the scales to be used for accuracy and calibrate, if necessary, as instructed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the scales to be used for accuracy and calibrate, if necessary, as instructed.

pcs.text: Check the press and its location for safety according to workplace standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check the press and its location for safety according to workplace standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the press and its location for safety according to workplace standards.

pcs.text: Check for any defective equipment and report to the supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check for any defective equipment and report to the supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check for any defective equipment and report to the supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify the lines of wool to be pressed and confirm with the supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the lines of wool to be pressed and confirm with the supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the lines of wool to be pressed and confirm with the supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for wool pressing

elements.title: Press wool

pcs.text: Apply safe working practices using the available safety equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply safe working practices using the available safety equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply safe working practices using the available safety equipment.

pcs.text: Remove contamination from the woolpack and place in the appropriate location
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove contamination from the woolpack and place in the appropriate location?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove contamination from the woolpack and place in the appropriate location.

pcs.text: Place all wool correctly and evenly in the press, as directed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place all wool correctly and evenly in the press, as directed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place all wool correctly and evenly in the press, as directed.

pcs.text: Press bales safely for weight and length as directed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Press bales safely for weight and length as directed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Press bales safely for weight and length as directed.

pcs.text: Keep work area in a condition that avoids contamination of the wool
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Keep work area in a condition that avoids contamination of the wool?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Keep work area in a condition that avoids contamination of the wool.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Press wool

elements.title: Close bales

pcs.text: Use approved bale dividers as instructed and ensure flaps are correctly fastened
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use approved bale dividers as instructed and ensure flaps are correctly fastened?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use approved bale dividers as instructed and ensure flaps are correctly fastened.

pcs.text: Identify bales for branding before removing them from the press
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify bales for branding before removing them from the press?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify bales for branding before removing them from the press.

pcs.text: Store bales safely, avoiding injury to presser, risk to other workers, and damage to bales and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store bales safely, avoiding injury to presser, risk to other workers, and damage to bales and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store bales safely, avoiding injury to presser, risk to other workers, and damage to bales and equipment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Close bales

elements.title: Complete recording requirement

pcs.text: Brand bales as directed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Brand bales as directed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Brand bales as directed according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Weigh bales and have weight confirmed by supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Weigh bales and have weight confirmed by supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Weigh bales and have weight confirmed by supervisor.

pcs.text: Record bale weights, numbers and descriptions using the appropriate recording system, as directed, and confirm with the supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record bale weights, numbers and descriptions using the appropriate recording system, as directed, and confirm with the supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record bale weights, numbers and descriptions using the appropriate recording system, as directed, and confirm with the supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete recording requirement

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
